messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0084",
  "title": "韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 26,
  "page_range": "26"
}

## 韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜

message.content: This section presents a ranked list of the highest-grossing mobile games in South Korea. It is structured to answer questions regarding: **Topics & Entities**: Which mobile game titles lead the South Korean market; **Metrics**: Revenue/grossing figures and relative ranking positions; **Evidence Types**: A quantitative ranking table or chart providing market performance data. The provided excerpt does not specify dates, definitions, procedures, or claims, but the complete section would contain the exact game titles, revenue values, and applicable reporting timeframe for retrieval.
